# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before the build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Main build commands (one per line)'
        required: true
        type: string
        default: 'echo "No build commands specified"'
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after the build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for executing commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
        default: 'bash'
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      continue_on_error:
        description: 'Continue workflow even if commands fail'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      environment_variables:
        description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE, one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      runner_os:
        description: 'Operating system to run on'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Timeout for the build job in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 30
      setup_commands:
        description: 'Setup/installation commands (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      test_commands:
        description: 'Test commands to run after build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      artifact_paths:
        description: 'Paths to upload as artifacts (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for the uploaded artifacts'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build-artifacts'

jobs:
  custom_build:
    name: Custom Build Job
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner_os }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJson(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set environment variables
        if: inputs.environment_variables != ''
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
          echo "${{ inputs.environment_variables }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run setup commands
        if: inputs.setup_commands != ''
        continue-on-error: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          echo "Running setup commands..."
          ${{ inputs.setup_commands }}

      - name: Run pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        continue-on-error: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          echo "Running pre-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}

      - name: Run build commands
        continue-on-error: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          echo "Running main build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Run post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        continue-on-error: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          echo "Running post-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}

      - name: Run test commands
        if: inputs.test_commands != ''
        continue-on-error: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          echo "Running test commands..."
          ${{ inputs.test_commands }}

      - name: Upload artifacts
        if: inputs.artifact_paths != ''
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: |
            ${{ inputs.artifact_paths }}
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Build summary
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Runner OS**: ${{ inputs.runner_os }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Shell Type**: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Working Directory**: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Continue on Error**: ${{ inputs.continue_on_error }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Status**: ${{ job.status }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
